subject: Security alert
body:
[image: Google]
App password created to sign in to your account


yabescoding@gmail.com
If you didn't generate this password for email-phising-detector, someone
might be using your account. Check and secure your account now.
Check activity
<https://accounts.google.com/AccountChooser?Email=yabescoding@gmail.com&continue=https://myaccount.google.com/alert/nt/1780203839149?rfn%3D20%26rfnc%3D1%26eid%3D-9127288254430175606%26et%3D0>
You can also see security activity at
https://myaccount.google.com/notifications
You received this email to let you know about important changes to your
Google Account and services.
© 2026 Google LLC, 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043, USA

analysis.summary: A security alert email from Google informs the recipient that an app password was created for their account, potentially indicating phishing activity. The email advises the user to check and secure their account immediately.
